source_pr.title: *: make TestPointGetReadLock stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Shuaipeng Yu <jackysp@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:
`TestPointGetReadLock` is still not stable

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
Move it to serial test and force-reload schema for all lock and unlock DDLs.

How it Works:

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

evidence: evidence: PR title: *: make TestPointGetReadLock stable
evidence: run test in serial suite + reload schema after each DDL (`mustExecDDL`) to avoid cache-related flakes (executor/point_get_test.go)
